# Arvi AI Tech

Arvi AI Tech engineers intelligent games and bespoke AI systems — game development, AI agents, machine learning, generative AI, and automation.

## Services
- **AI Game Solutions**: Smart NPCs, adaptive difficulty, AI opponents, and procedural content.
- **Custom AI Systems**: Bespoke ML models, computer vision, and predictive engines.
- **Generative AI**: Chatbots, RAG copilots, and content engines on modern LLMs.
- **Autonomous Agents**: Multi-step AI agents that plan, call tools, and automate tasks.
- **App Engineering**: AI-native mobile (Flutter) and web applications.

## Active Playtests
- **CricPulse**: Next-generation smart cricket scoring and live analytics.
- **Arrow Escape**: Arrow-based puzzle runner game.

## Contact
- Email: hello@arviaitech.com
- Website: https://arviaitech.com

For more details on projects or consulting, please reach out via email.
